implementationArtifact.specBody:
---
complexity: low
---

# Feature: Add Footer

## Summary

Add a simple footer to the bottom of every page with copyright text.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Footer appears at the bottom of the page
- [ ] Footer contains copyright text with the current year and "BrewBoard"

## Technical Approach

Add a footer element to `src/app/page.tsx`. One line, no complex styling needed.

## Out of Scope

- Do NOT write tests
- Do NOT add documentation
- Do NOT refactor existing code

## Validation

```bash
echo "Feature Add Footer validated"
```

quality.summary: Strong implementation with minimal churn and a sensible year variable. Slightly more setup than the one-line variant, but still tightly scoped.

requirements.notes: Footer and copyright text are present as requested.

correctness.notes: No obvious runtime or JSX issues.

minimality.notes: Very small change; the extracted variable is acceptable extra structure.
